mission.title: rook: kubelet_volume* / persistent volume metrics missing
mission.description: kubelet_volume* / persistent volume metrics missing. Requested by 14+ users.

steps.title: Check current rook deployment
steps.description:
Verify your rook version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
helm list -n rook 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working rook installation.

steps.title: Review rook configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant rook configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get configmap -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=rook
```
Is this a bug report or feature request? **BUG**

* Bug Report

**Bug Report**

What happened:
 I am trying to get kubelet_volume_* metrics working. According this google/cadvisor#1702 (comment) there should be support after 1.8 kube.

steps.title: Apply the fix for kubelet_volume* / persistent volume metrics missing
steps.description:
This allows to export persistent volume metrics.

According to https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/67400 in kubernetes 1.13 metrics support for flex volume was added.
I wonder, is adding support metrics flag enough to fix the issue?
```yaml
curl -s https://localhost:10255/metrics -k|grep kubelet_volume|wc -L
0
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n rook -l app.kubernetes.io/name=rook
kubectl get events -n rook --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "kubelet_volume* / persistent volume metrics missing" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
This allows to export persistent volume metrics.

According to https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/issues/67400 in kubernetes 1.13 metrics support for flex volume was added.
I wonder, is adding support metrics flag enough to fix the issue?
codeSnippets:
pvc-d64b963b-4578-11e8-9cf2-d4ae526fcc30   100Gi      RWO            Delete           Bound     default/prom-test-prometheus-server         rook-block               2d

prom-test-prometheus-server         Bound     pvc-d64b963b-4578-11e8-9cf2-d4ae526fcc30   100Gi      RWO            rook-block     2d

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with rook installed or the issue environment reproducible.
